docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAINES, SHANNON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SHANNON GAINES IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CABLE CAR HOTEL REPRESENTED BY KRIS MIRANDA AND JEAN CLAUDE LAIR, PROPERTY MANAGER. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 5/7/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GAINES, SHANNON AS TO DEFENDANT CABLE CAR HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
